title: Beef Empanada Tartine
description: A French-inspired twist on the traditional Argentine empanada, served as a crispy tartine.
instructions: Slice the baguette into 1-inch thick rounds.
Place the baguette slices on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
Meanwhile, cook the ground beef in a pan over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Season the beef with salt and black pepper to taste.
Warm the empanadas according to package instructions.
To assemble the tartine, place a toasted baguette slice on a plate, top with a warm empanada, and spoon some of the beef mixture over the top.
Drizzle with butter and sprinkle with chopped parsley if desired.
